title: review-panel reviewer findings
description: Structured findings one reviewer emits. The adjudicator gates HIGH+ findings empirically before any of them can block.

reviewer_role.description: codex-domain | codex-integration | gemini | grok | composer | opus-skeptic

mechanism.description: why it is wrong, step by step

repro_command.description: shell run from repo root in the adjudication worktree; exits with expected_exit iff the finding holds. For a fix proposal: 'git apply PATCH && <gate>' asserting the gate now passes.

expected_exit.description: exit code that CONFIRMS the finding (a test that SHOULD fail => non-zero; a fix that SHOULD make the gate pass => 0)

observed_result.description: what the reviewer saw when IT ran repro_command; null if it did not run it
